fields.title: Wire plan mode into prompt mode system
fields.description: Update src/prompt/modes.ts to add 'plan' as a PromptModePresetName. Update DEFAULT_PROMPT_MODE_CONFIG with plan's model/thinking/promptFile. Update isPromptModePresetName/isPromptModeName. Update the /mode command handler to include plan in the selector and list output.
fields.close_reason: Plan mode wired into prompt mode system: modes.ts, prompt-modes.ts, state.ts all updated. /mode selector, list, usage all include plan.
